name: Low income in Basilicata
description: Employee earning €20,000 in Basilicata (lowest regional tax rate). Includes employment tax credit (detrazione lavoro dipendente) and cuneo fiscale. Verified using verify_italy_tax.py script implementing official formulas.

sources.description: Basilicata has the lowest regional tax rate at 1.23% (national minimum)
Employment tax credit formula - creates no-tax area at €8,500
Verified using verify_italy_tax.py (independent Python implementation of official formulas)
